SEARCH
Package io.github.kirstenali.deepj.tensor

Class TensorAdapters

java.lang.Object
io.github.kirstenali.deepj.tensor.TensorAdapters
public final class TensorAdapters extends Object
Utilities for converting between Tensor and flat GPU float arrays.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Tensor
    fromIntColumn(int[] values)
    Build a [n x 1] tensor from integer ids (stored as float values).
    static float[]
    packF32(Tensor t)
    Pack a Tensor's data into a flat float32 array (row-major).
    static Tensor
    unpackF32(float[] flat, int rows, int cols)
    Unpack a flat float32 array into a new Tensor.
    static void
    unpackF32Into(float[] flat, Tensor t)
    Unpack a flat float32 array into an existing tensor's data[].

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • packF32

      public static float[] packF32(Tensor t)
      Pack a Tensor's data into a flat float32 array (row-major).

    • fromIntColumn

      public static Tensor fromIntColumn(int[] values)
      Build a [n x 1] tensor from integer ids (stored as float values).

    • unpackF32

      public static Tensor unpackF32(float[] flat, int rows, int cols)
      Unpack a flat float32 array into a new Tensor.

    • unpackF32Into

      public static void unpackF32Into(float[] flat, Tensor t)
      Unpack a flat float32 array into an existing tensor's data[]. Used by ComputeGraph to materialize GPU results without allocating a new Tensor.
